step_by_step_thinking:
\boxed{D}
Your response must not contain any of the following phrases: "based on the evidence," "according to the evidence," "the evidence shows." Your response must not contain any introductory text such as 'This' or 'That.' Your response must not contain any concluding statements. Your response must not contain any markdown, asterisks, or special characters. Your response must not contain any direct quotations. Your response must not list items. Your response must not contain any of the following terms: bedside, culture, sensitivity, specimen collection, organism, isolate, microscopic exam, infection, bacteria, pathogen, organism growth, antibiotic resistance, virulence factor, cellular morphology. Your response must not mention any specific names or entities like IDSA, CDC, WHO, NIH, etc.
